row_status_meaning.in_scope_for_later_full_value_score_only: LGSSM can become a full observed-data value+score row only after same-target value execution and total-derivative score gates pass.
row_status_meaning.amended_sir_log_scale_theta_full_row_can: Fixed spatial SIR has the 2026-07-06 human-amended sir_log_scale_theta model-parameter surface; value and score admission still require same-target gates.
row_status_meaning.scoped_component_row: The row computes a component or different target and must not be compared as a full observed-data filtering row.
row_status_meaning.blocked_value: No admitted current LEDH value route for the requested row target yet.
row_status_meaning.blocked_score: No admitted total-derivative score artifact for the requested row target yet.

required_phase2_work: wire the actual highdim LGSSM row tensors into the LEDH-inclusive runner
rows.required_score_admission_artifact: exact Kalman score or trusted same-target finite difference in Phase 3; no score execution in Phase 2
forbidden_claims: do not claim all-model LEDH readiness from LGSSM
do not claim score correctness before the Kalman or same-target finite-difference gate

do not use legacy DPF route existence as current GPU/XLA leaderboard admission

nonclaims: This ledger does not execute LEDH values.
This ledger does not certify LEDH score correctness.
This ledger does not claim HMC readiness.
This ledger does not claim source-faithfulness to Zhao-Cui TT/SIRT or MATLAB code.
This ledger does not runtime-rank fresh LEDH rows against frozen non-LEDH baseline rows.
